/this-is-free-xyz.reason: No route, no alias, no view, no menu link. Top-level path is free for a node alias.

/moderated-content.reason: No route or alias claims it. The Moderated content view lives at /admin/content/moderated, not /moderated-content, so no current or routine-config conflict.

/blog.reason: Already an existing path alias: /blog => /page/2 (a canvas_page node). Reusing it collides with that alias.

/search.reason: Active route view.search.page (views.view.search, enabled) already serves /search.

/admin/content/files.reason: views.view.files is currently DISABLED but ships with the enabled file module; enabling it (routine admin action) claims /admin/content/files. Also under /admin, reserved for system routes.

/admin/content/media/scheduled.reason: views.view.scheduler_scheduled_media is currently DISABLED but Scheduler+Media are enabled; turning on media scheduling (routine config) enables it at /admin/content/media/scheduled. Also under /admin, reserved for system routes.
